observations.command: RCH_VISIBILITY=summary RCH_PRIORITY=low rch exec -- cargo check --all-targets
observations.evidence_excerpt: error[E0560]: struct InclusionProof has no field named root_hash
observations.resolution_pattern: sync benchmark fixture constructors and call sites with the current public API before rerunning the broad check

observations.command: RCH_VISIBILITY=summary RCH_PRIORITY=low rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenengine-node --test operator_transcripts
observations.evidence_excerpt: remote job produced no output for 180s while typechecking the test surface
observations.resolution_pattern: poll the existing RCH session, avoid starting duplicate cargo work, and record worker plus command when surfacing a blocker

observations.evidence_excerpt: pgrep count was greater than 2 before starting a heavy build
observations.resolution_pattern: back off or use an existing remote slot only after inspecting whether the local count is RCH sync, wrapper, or real rustc work

observations.evidence_excerpt: bd-czf6g remained in_progress by RainyAspen with an older updated_at while the queue needed anti-collision checks
observations.resolution_pattern: run br show plus exact in-progress lookup, treat active ownership as a soft lock, and pivot unless the bead is truly stale

observations.evidence_excerpt: proof ledger expected receipt artifact artifacts/validation_broker/bd-missing/receipt.json but the file was absent
observations.resolution_pattern: create or refresh the machine-readable evidence artifact before claiming proof coverage

observations.evidence_excerpt: UBS exited 0 with warnings from test-only assert and fixture-auditor inventory
observations.resolution_pattern: record scanner exit status and classify warning-only source/test inventory separately from product bugs

existing_beads.title: Template: cargo contention backoff for LOCAL_CARGO_CONTENTION
